title: OREGON MOTHERSCARE - 211info
text: COASTAL HEALTHCARE LINCOLN CITY OREGON MOTHERSCARE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Oregon MothersCare provides prenatal assessments to help women begin the path to prenatal care. Services include pregnancy testing, OHP application assistance, streamlined intake/referral for prenatal care, and dental care referrals. Specialized information and referral also available for WIC, home visitation programs, and other prenatal support services. 1105 SE Jetty Avenue Suite C Lincoln City, OR 97367 Eligibility: Pregnant women at any stage of pregnancy Hours: Monday-Tuesday/ Thursday-Friday 8am-5pm Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Lincoln County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Services: Dental Care Referrals * Pregnant Individuals Navigator Programs * Pregnant Individuals Physician Referrals * Pregnant Individuals Pregnancy Testing Specialized Information and Referral * Pregnant Individuals Other Services Offered At This Location: GENERAL MEDICAL CARE - GENERAL MEDICAL CARE HEALTH SCREENING/DIAGNOSTIC SERVICES - SCREENWISE-ENROLLING HUMAN REPRODUCTION - OREGON REPRODUCTIVE HEALTH PROGRAM CLINIC If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. COASTAL HEALTHCARE LINCOLN CITY
